prompt: A photorealistic scene of a gutted industrial warehouse after a severe fire, with charred structural beams, collapsed roof sections, melted plastic drums leaking unknown chemicals onto scorched concrete, scattered fire extinguishers, and visible GHS hazard placards warped by heat on remaining wall fragments

A photorealistic scene of a chemical manufacturing plant heavily damaged by fire, with ruptured storage tanks spilling corrosive liquids, blackened pipework, fire-damaged pallets of labeled solvent containers, partially melted safety signage, and firefighter foam residue pooling on the ground

A photorealistic scene of a research laboratory destroyed by fire, with shattered glass beakers and reagent bottles scattered across burned benchtops, a collapsed fume hood, charred biohazard waste bins, smoke-stained MSDS sheets on the wall, and exposed gas line valves amid debris

A photorealistic scene of a freight loading dock with scattered unmarked barrels, suspicious white powder residue on the ground, abandoned personal protective equipment including gas masks and gloves, overturned crates with visible corrosive and toxic hazard labels, and a damaged decontamination shower unit

A photorealistic scene of a fire-ravaged hazardous materials storage yard, with rows of blackened and bulging chemical drums, a collapsed chain-link perimeter fence, melted radioactive trefoil warning signs, fire-damaged spill containment berms, and ash-covered compressed gas cylinders scattered across the ground
